2025-26 Los Angeles Lakers Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 53-29, Finished 4th in NBA Western Conference

Coach: JJ Redick (53-29)

Executive: Rob Pelinka

PTS/G: 116.3 (11th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 114.6 (11th of 30)

SRS: 1.68 (15th of 30) Pace: 98.3 (22nd of 30)

Off Rtg: 118.2 (9th of 30) Def Rtg: 116.4 (19th of 30) Net Rtg: +1.8 (14th of 30)

Expected W-L: 45-37 (14th of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +1600, Over-Under 46.5

Arena: Crypto.com Arena Attendance: 773,047 (10th of 30)

NBA 2026 Playoffs:
Won NBA Western Conference First Round (4-2) versus Houston Rockets  (Series Stats)
Lost NBA Western Conference Semifinals (0-4) versus Oklahoma City Thunder  (Series Stats)

Win Shares Per 48 Minutes

Win Shares Per 48 Minutes

Luka Dončić .199 (9th)

Box Plus/Minus

Box Plus/Minus
A box score estimate of the points per 100 possessions a player contributed above a league-average player, translated to an average team.

Luka Dončić 9.3 (4th)
LeBron James 3.5 (20th)

Offensive Box Plus/Minus

Offensive Box Plus/Minus
A box score estimate of the offensive points per 100 possessions a player contributed above a league-average player, translated to an average team.

Luka Dončić 8.0 (3rd)
Austin Reaves 3.4 (20th)

Value Over Replacement Player

Value over Replacement Player
A box score estimate of the points per 100 TEAM possessions that a player contributed above a replacement-level (-2.0) player, translated to an average team and prorated to an 82-game season.

Multiply by 2.70 to convert to wins over replacement.

Luka Dončić 6.6 (3rd)

Offensive Rating

Offensive Rating
An estimate of points produced (players) or scored (teams) per 100 possessions

Deandre Ayton 129.1 (13th)

Usage Pct

Usage Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of team plays used by a player while they were on the floor.

Luka Dončić 38.1 (1st)

Total Rebound Pct

Total Rebound Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of available rebounds a player grabbed while they were on the floor.

Deandre Ayton 17.2 (11th)

Offensive Rebound Pct

Offensive Rebound Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of available offensive rebounds a player grabbed while they were on the floor.

Deandre Ayton 11.5 (8th)

Assist Pct

Assist Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of teammate field goals a player assisted while they were on the floor.

Luka Dončić 40.5 (5th)
LeBron James 34.1 (12th)

Steal Pct

Steal Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of opponent possessions that end with a steal by the player while they were on the floor.

Jake LaRavia 2.5 (11th)
Marcus Smart 2.4 (12th)
Luka Dončić 2.2 (19th)

Block Pct

Block Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of opponent two-point field goal attempts blocked by the player while they were on the floor.

Deandre Ayton 3.3 (20th)

Turnover Pct

Turnover Percentage
An estimate of turnovers committed per 100 plays.

Rui Hachimura 6.3 (4th)

Triple-Doubles

Triple-Doubles The NBA did not track Triple-Doubles until 1979-80 when Magic Johnson popularized the feat. Nonetheless, we can present Triple-Doubles since 1950-51 when rebounds became an official statistic. A small number may yet be unaccounted for but we're confident in the completeness of the list.

Luka Dončić 8 (4th)
LeBron James 3 (8th)
